observationScope: Future non-production staged-runtime observation only; not activation, onboarding, selection, data promotion, Supabase work, migration work, historical activation, DriveTexas resumption, or Transportation Intelligence activation.
monitoringMetrics: Montgomery runtime status invariants: operational=false, productionEnabled=false, selectable=false
Montgomery active-county override attempts resolving back to Liberty
Changed-path audit for supabase/, migrations/, and data/
containmentChecksToMonitor: Liberty rows allowed only in Liberty context
Montgomery rows blocked from Liberty context while staged disabled
Montgomery rows blocked from Montgomery active context while Montgomery is non-operational
Missing county metadata defaults only to Liberty legacy behavior
Montgomery package asset references remain outside data/
regressionsToMonitor: Liberty no longer active by default
Montgomery becomes operational, production-enabled, or selectable
Historical reads, history UI, historical API exposure, or consumer history dashboard becomes enabled
Transportation Intelligence enabled, display, or activation state changes
successCriteria: Zero Supabase, migration, or data/ asset-promotion changes
Zero Montgomery activation, onboarding, selection, or production enablement events
All validation/audit commands pass at observation closeout
Any moderate observation is documented with owner, severity, and accepted disposition before closeout
recommendedObservationDuration: Minimum 7 calendar days after a separately authorized observation start decision.
finalReadinessAssessment: Ready for future staged-runtime observation with observations; not launch ready and not production activation ready.
